section_miscategorizations.text: The MRI reveals a dorsal displacement of the base of the second metatarsal with a 3mm separation of the first and second metatarsal bases and a bony fragment in the Lisfranc joint space.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This sentence is phrased as an imaging result, which belongs in O, but in the context of the note the MRI is also listed as an order in the Plan, creating a temporal inconsistency (result documented before the test is ordered). The placement in O is semantically correct; the minor issue is organizational/chronologic rather than a true section miscategorization.

section_miscategorizations.text: An MRI is ordered to assess ligament injury.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Ordering an MRI appropriately belongs in the Plan. However, because a detailed MRI result is already documented in the Objective section, this order appears redundant or out of sequence. The section is correct; the issue is minor structural inconsistency rather than misplacement.
